items.explain: Focus: critical-path traceback from worst slack.

items.prompt: You can safely propagate arrivals before the timing graph is levelized.
items.explain: Levelization (or equivalent topo order) comes first.

items.prompt: After running the algorithm you should report…
choices: Only a screenshot of the UI
Tagged times and/or slack / path metrics for the starter

items.prompt: Track A asks you to implement critical-path traceback from worst slack on a tiny netlist.
